Interactive Features

External links: visit the pricing page or write to sales.

Link styling

An undecorated quiet link keeps its color but loses the underline.

A brand-colored link keeps the author color.

Internal navigation

Fragments

Jump back to the introduction. A link to a missing anchor renders as link text without a dead annotation.

Outline Structure

The two h1 headings, their h2 children, and the h3 form the PDF bookmark tree.
